description.value: You can pull a chunk of the ethereal realm of dreams into reality, providing you and allies with a measure of safety. You can cast cozy crashpad as a 3rd-rank arcane innate spell once per day, except it comes with a vendor constructed entirely based on your desires (though once chosen, it can't be changed). You can order items from this attendant, with an item level equal to or less than half your level (rounded up). As long as you pay for these items, they appear at the end of the 12-hour duration or when you Dismiss the spell.
